Dear Mr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Software Engineer at Tech Innovations Pte Ltd. Your employment will commence on 1st December 2023, with a starting annual salary of SGD 75,000. 

Please report to our office at 123 Innovation Lane, Singapore, and direct any queries to our HR department at +65 6123 4567 or hr@techinnovations.sg.

We look forward to your positive response and your contribution to our team.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Emily Wong  
Head of Human Resources  
Tech Innovations Pte Ltd
